title: Pinterest Zero-Cleanup — Stage A Preliminary Audit (read-only)
scope: Read-only inventory + DB-side quality audit across Pinterest ecosystem. No mutations. No new Gemini multimodal spend.

live_pins_currently_active_in_db.note: 893 rows are likely Pinterest-side ghosts from earlier cleanup waves — DB marked rejected but pinterest_pin_id never cleared. Requires live /v5/pins/{id} verification (deferred until decisions confirmed).

delete_from_pinterest_high_confidence.criteria: media_audit.status='BLOCKED' AND pinterest_pin_id IS NOT NULL
delete_from_pinterest_high_confidence.blocked_by: Pinterest pins:write / pin_edit scope NOT granted (per 2026-06-25-pinterest-metadata-repair.json). Cannot DELETE remotely.

ghost_verification_required.criteria: status='rejected' AND pinterest_pin_id IS NOT NULL — confirm via GET /v5/pins/{id} whether each still exists on Pinterest. Roughly 9 Pinterest API calls/sec under rate limit ≈ 100 minutes total.

pcie2_system_health.skipped_jobs_5706_explanation: Skipped after 1,500 creative target reached; Evolution Guard v2 rejected over-similar generations. Expected steady-state behaviour.

decisions_required_before_stage_b.question: Pinterest pins:write / pin_edit scope is still ungranted. Pick one:

options.a: DB-only cleanup (mark rejected/archived in DB, leave bad pins live on Pinterest serving impressions).
options.b: Pause Stage B; finish Stage A live verification + Stage C (firewall) + Stage D (report) only.
options.c: Export delete list as CSV for manual bulk-delete in Pinterest UI.

decisions_required_before_stage_b.recommendation: b — finish what we control, queue the rest for after scope upgrade.

decisions_required_before_stage_b.question: Full scale (~700–900 candidates) or capped (e.g. confidence ≥ 0.95 only)?
Approve ~$4–8 of Gemini 2.5 Flash multimodal scoring across 939 pin_id rows for product-match + visual-DNA verdict?
decisions_required_before_stage_b.default_if_declined: Skip live multimodal; rely on existing media_audit + integrity-guard signals only.

decisions_required_before_stage_b.question: May I unschedule any *additional* legacy Pinterest crons discovered during audit? (No active crons currently visible from sandbox role.)
